description.value: Aura faint conjuration (creation); CL 5th; Slot none; Price 500 gp; Weight 4 lbs. DESCRIPTION This leather bag exudes a pungent scent when opened. Each day it provides enough dried dung to fuel a small fire for 8 hours or fertilize a 20-foot-square patch of land. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, create food and water; Cost 250 gp
